atlassian.description: Access Jira and Confluence through Atlassian MCP. Use for searching issues/pages, reading project context, and updating Atlassian work items.

chrome-dev-tools.description: Control and inspect Chrome through DevTools MCP. Use for browser debugging, page inspection, console/network analysis, and UI verification.

firebase.description: Use Firebase project and app tooling through Firebase MCP. Use for Firebase setup, app inspection, deployment help, and Firebase-specific operations.

cloud-run.description: Use Google Cloud Run MCP for Cloud Run service inspection, deployment support, and runtime operations.

gcloud.description: Run Google Cloud CLI workflows through gcloud MCP. Use for Google Cloud project, resource, and command-line operations.

terraform.description: Search Terraform Registry providers, modules, policies, and documentation. Use for current Terraform resource/module details and version lookup.

gopls.description: Go language intelligence via gopls MCP: workspace/package context, symbols, references, diagnostics, APIs, vuln checks, and refactors.

agentic-interaction.description: Connect to the local agentic-interaction MCP service. Use for local workflow automation and agent coordination tools exposed by that server.

google-developer-knowledge.description: Search and retrieve official Google developer documentation. Use for Google Cloud, Firebase, Android, Chrome, Go, Gemini, TensorFlow, and web.dev answers.

solo.description: Connect to Solo's local MCP integration. Use for tools and workflows exposed by the Solo desktop app.
